title: <div>A story that revolves around the release of the three Star Wars trilogies.
content:
A story that revolves around the release of the three Star Wars trilogies. One character experiences the release of the Star Wars films over the course of their lives, and what are the differing life circumstances that surround each release?

From “The Writer’s Journey”:


A story about fathers and sons in the real world.
context: From document: A story that revolves around the release of the three Star Wars trilogies…
